prompt: A segmentation label map of a cluttered desktop, dividing regions into keyboard, mouse, monitor, books, cups, and background.
prompt_refined: A top-down segmentation label map of a cluttered desktop. A computer monitor is centered at the back of the desk, with a keyboard directly in front of it and a mouse to the right. Multiple books and cups are scattered randomly across the remaining desk area, creating a cluttered appearance. Each distinct region for the monitor, keyboard, mouse, books, cups, and the desktop background should be represented by a solid, uniform color.
objects: computer monitor (centered at the back of the desk)
keyboard (directly in front of the monitor)
